def negative_project_exception_class_not_inheriting_shared_base():
    rule_id = "project_exception_class_not_inheriting_shared_base"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Custom exception class defined without inheriting from the project-wide base exception class."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
